summary: P0 Critical Bug Fix Testing - Failed Job Recovery Routing. All features verified. Backend: 17/18 tests passed (1 skipped - no processing jobs). Frontend Playwright: Failed Recovery Screen working correctly with human-readable messages, no raw enums visible. Deep-link support working. Fixed legacy pipeline_jobs to include view_mode and retry_info fields.

details: Backend status endpoint returns view_mode field (result/failed_recovery/progress)
Legacy pipeline_jobs now include view_mode (fixed during testing)
Human-readable failure message: 'The final video assembly did not complete'
Credits refunded message: '21 credits refunded to your account'
Retry Generation button present with data-testid='recovery-retry-btn'
Edit Story & Retry button present with data-testid='recovery-edit-retry-btn'
Start Fresh button present with data-testid='recovery-start-fresh-btn'
MySpace shows 'Needs attention' label instead of raw enums
Failed job deep-link opens Failed Recovery Screen
Human-readable status labels (QUEUED, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, PARTIAL, FAILED)
No raw enums in MySpace page
Story data preserved in localStorage for edit mode

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Legacy pipeline_jobs status response now includes view_mode and retry_info fields
Added _legacy_compute_view_mode() helper function for legacy job routing
FAILED_STATE_LABELS in frontend correctly maps raw enums to human-readable copy
trackRecoveryEvent() function sends analytics to backend
Server-authoritative routing via view_mode field working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix for failed job recovery routing is complete. The fix adds: (1) view_mode field to status response for server-authoritative routing, (2) FailedRecoveryScreen component for failed jobs, (3) Deep-link support via projectId URL parameter, (4) Analytics tracking for recovery events. Legacy pipeline_jobs now also include view_mode and retry_info. No raw enums (FAILED_PLANNING, FAILED_RENDER, etc.) are visible in the UI.

playwright_results.human_readable_failure_message: PASS ('The final video assembly did not complete')

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: View Progress on failed jobs was routing to broken Result page, leaking raw backend enums
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Server-authoritative view_mode routing + dedicated FailedRecoveryScreen component
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - Failed jobs now correctly show Failed Recovery Screen with human-readable messages
